signals.headline: Ripple Unveils XRPL Quantum-Resistant Roadmap | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple Unveils XRPL Quantum-Resistant Roadmap | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple announced a detailed four-phase roadmap on April 20, 2026, to make the XRP Ledger quantum-ready by 2028, with Phase 3 testing hybrid signatures in H2 2026; this positions XRPL ahead of Bitcoin and Ethereum on quantum security timelines, signaling proactive tech leadership amid rising quantum threats.[1][2][5]

signals.headline: Japan Activates XRP-Powered Remittances | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Japan Activates XRP-Powered Remittances | YES | HIGH confidence**  
On April 20, 2026, SBI Remit and Tottori Bank launched an XRP-based international remittance service, boosting adoption alongside XRP's 6.7% weekly gains, Rakuten Wallet listing, XRPL zero-knowledge tech integration, and $38.86M US ETF inflows over four days.[2]

signals.headline: Ripple CEO: XRP Can Flip Ethereum Market Cap | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple CEO: XRP Can Flip Ethereum Market Cap | NO | MED confidence**  
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse stated on or around April 14-21, 2026, that XRP has a realistic shot at surpassing Ethereum's $286B market cap (needing ~$4.60 price, 240% gain), citing cross-border utility and regulatory wins like March 2026 SEC/CFTC commodity classification; Standard Chartered projects $8 EOY 2026.[3]

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Nears, XRP as Digital Commodity Confirmed | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Markup Nears, XRP as Digital Commodity Confirmed | NO | MED confidence**  
SEC/CFTC joint classification of XRP as a 'digital commodity' (like BTC/ETH) was formalized in March 2026, shifting oversight to CFTC; Senate markup scheduled week of April 13 with potential stablecoin yield compromise, but no final passage confirmed as of late April—key for ETF inflows ($1.44B cumulative).[1][3

signals.raw:
Ethereum 170% Rally Pattern Emerges | NO | LOW confidence**  
Technical analysis detects a 2021-like pattern post-April 2026 BTC pair bottom, targeting $8,500 (170% from ~$2,358 on April 17); no fundamental confirmation like upgrades or approvals.[4][6]
